creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to omars from comment #214)

It didn't work for me. I have lost faith in FreeBSD being able to stay current with modern hardware. It continually falls behind other OSs in supporting newer, more efficient, and safe hardware. Now, it can not even support the latest versions of Samba. Maybe it is time to turn off the light and close the door. 😞
